name: Umanis SA
summary: Umanis SA operates as a digital service company in France. The company offers big data and artificial intelligence services, such as testing, data strategy, governance, intelligent analysis, agility, compliance, data platform, and architecture; and digital solutions, including user experience, digital experience platforms, customized solutions, digital service centers, agility, and DevOps. It also provides business integration solutions for customer relationship management, HRMS, and EPM; infrastructure and cloud services comprising application management, and infrastructure and workstation services, as well as financial optimization and security, agility, and DevOps services; and business process outsourcing services. In addition, the company offers design, IT consulting, and technical services. It serves health-life science-pharmacy, energy, manufacturing and utilities, telecoms, public sector, services and real estate, retail, transport, and luxury sectors. The company was formerly known as Europstat and changed its name to Umanis SA in 2000. Umanis SA was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Levallois-Perret, France.
